titles.title: Dune: Part Two
titles.description: Follow the mythic journey of Paul Atreides as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a path of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, Paul endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

titles.title: Animal
titles.description: The hardened son of a powerful industrialist returns home after years abroad and vows to take bloody revenge on those threatening his father's life.

titles.title: I Can Only Imagine 2
titles.description: Following the breakout success of the song 'I Can Only Imagine', MercyMe's Bart Millard is living the dream—sold-out arenas, a devoted fanbase, and a thriving career. But behind the spotlight, Bart's past threatens the family he's built, especially the fragile bond with his son Sam. When hopeful newcomer Tim Timmons joins the band for their biggest tour yet, he unknowingly brings a renewed gratitude to Bart's life through their unlikely friendship. Bart soon discovers that Tim carries hardships—and secrets—of his own, forcing him to face his past and repair his relationships with Sam and his wife Shannon before fame costs him what matters most.

titles.title: Interstellar
titles.description: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

titles.title: Mortal Kombat II
titles.description: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

titles.title: Chal Mera Putt 3
titles.description: Chal Mera Putt 3 revolves around the lives of illegal immigrants in UK, their friendship and their constant struggle of finding a home away from home.

titles.title: The Ninth Gate
titles.description: A rare book dealer finds himself at the heart of a string of paranormal events when he is hired to find the last two copies of a text, The Nine Gates of the Kingdom of Shadows, capable of summoning the Devil.

titles.title: Inuyashiki
titles.description: A middle-aged office worker encounters aliens and is gifted with alien technology and limitless powers.

titles.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie
titles.description: Having thwarted Bowser's previous plot to marry Princess Peach, Mario and Luigi now face a fresh threat in Bowser Jr., who is determined to liberate his father from captivity and restore the family legacy. Alongside companions new and old, the brothers travel across the stars to stop the young heir's crusade.

titles.title: Mithde
titles.description: A young man struggles to choose between staying to help his troubled village after high school or follow his heart to be with the girl he loves.

titles.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
titles.description: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

titles.title: The Dark Knight
titles.description: Batman raises the stakes in his war on crime. With the help of Lt. Jim Gordon and District Attorney Harvey Dent, Batman sets out to dismantle the remaining criminal organizations that plague the streets. The partnership proves to be effective, but they soon find themselves prey to a reign of chaos unleashed by a rising criminal mastermind known to the terrified citizens of Gotham as the Joker.

titles.title: Inception
titles.description: Dom Cobb is a skilled thief, the absolute best in the dangerous art of extraction, stealing valuable secrets from deep within the subconscious during the dream state, when the mind is at its most vulnerable. Cobb's rare ability has made him a coveted player in this treacherous new world of corporate espionage, but it has also made him an international fugitive and cost him everything he has ever loved. Now Cobb is being offered a chance at redemption. One last job could give him his life back but only if he can accomplish the impossible, inception. Instead of the perfect heist, Cobb and his team of specialists have to pull off the reverse: their task is not to steal an idea, but to plant one. If they succeed, it could be the perfect crime. But no amount of careful planning or expertise can prepare the team for the dangerous enemy that seems to predict their every move. An enemy that only Cobb could have seen coming.

titles.title: Oppenheimer
titles.description: A dramatization of the life story of J. Robert Oppenheimer, the physicist who had a large hand in the development of the atomic bomb, thus helping end World War 2. We see his life from university days all the way to post-WW2, where his fame saw him embroiled in political machinations.

titles.title: All of Us Are Dead
titles.description: It was a normal school day for the students of a Korean high school-until a student returns from the school's science lab, infected by an unknown virus. As the infection spreads out of school and throughout the peninsula, the Military desperately interrogates the psychotic science teacher who started it all, while his students struggle to survive until help arrives.

titles.title: Berlin and the Lady with an Ermine
titles.description: Berlin reunites his crew in Seville for an elaborate con targeting a powerful duke and his wife who've made the mistake of trying to blackmail him. Their plan involves faking the theft of a priceless painting as cover.

titles.title: Farzi
titles.description: An artist who gets pulled into the murky high stakes of a con job and a fiery task force officer on the mission to rid the country of his menaces in a fast-paced, edgy one-of-a-kind thriller.

titles.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
titles.description: Peter Parker asks Dr. Strange to make everyone forget he is Spider-Man.

titles.title: RRR
titles.description: Two legendary Indian revolutionaries join forces to fight against the British Raj.

titles.title: KGF Chapter 2
titles.description: Rocky's occupation of the Kolar Gold Fields makes the government and enemies very nervous.

titles.title: Top Gun: Maverick
titles.description: After thirty years, Maverick is still pushing the envelope as a top naval aviator.

titles.title: The Batman
titles.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues.

titles.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
titles.description: Thor enlists the help of Valkyrie, Korg and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster to fight a galactic killer.

titles.title: Pushpa: The Rise
titles.description: A red sandalwood smuggler rises through the ranks despite opposition.

titles.title: Black Adam
titles.description: Nearly 5,000 years after he was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods—and imprisoned—Black Adam is freed.

titles.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
titles.description: Jake Sully lives with his newfound family formed on the planet Pandora.

titles.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
titles.description: Doctor Strange teams up with a mysterious teenager who can travel between multiverses.

titles.title: Brahmastra Part One: Shiva
titles.description: Shiva is connected to a universe of mystical Astras. He discovers his special power.

titles.title: Laal Singh Chaddha
titles.description: An adaptation of the 1994 film Forrest Gump. A kind-hearted man witnesses historic events.

titles.title: Radhe Shyam
titles.description: A palmist in Europe falls for a beautiful woman and tries to woo her.

titles.title: Don't Look Up
titles.description: Two low-level astronomers must go on a giant media tour to warn mankind of a planet-killing comet.

titles.title: Uncharted
titles.description: Street-smart Nathan Drake is recruited by treasure hunter Victor Sullivan.

titles.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
titles.description: When a single mother and her two children move to a small town, they discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters.

titles.title: The Lost City
titles.description: A reclusive romance novelist gets kidnapped to help recover a lost city's treasure.

titles.title: Morbius
titles.description: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but he inadvertently infects himself with vampirism.

titles.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 2
titles.description: Sonic teams up with his new friend Tails and must defeat Dr. Robotnik.

titles.title: Moonfall
titles.description: A mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit and threatens humanity.

titles.title: Ambulance
titles.description: Two brothers steal an ambulance after their heist goes wrong.

titles.title: The Northman
titles.description: A young Viking prince seeks revenge for his murdered father.

titles.title: Men
titles.description: A young woman goes on a solo vacation to the English countryside following a personal tragedy.

titles.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
titles.description: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure across the multiverse.

titles.title: Nope
titles.description: The inhabitants of a lonely gulch in inland California bear witness to an alien event.

titles.title: Bullet Train
titles.description: Five assassins aboard a fast moving bullet train find out their missions are connected.

titles.title: Where the Crawdads Sing
titles.description: A woman raises herself in the marshes of North Carolina and becomes a murder suspect.

titles.title: Prey
titles.description: The origin story of the Predator in the world of the Comanche Nation 300 years ago.

titles.title: The Menu
titles.description: A couple travel to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant.

titles.title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
titles.description: The people of Wakanda fight to protect their home from intervening world powers.

titles.title: Varisu
titles.description: A CEO's son returns home to deal with business and family complications.

titles.title: Pathaan
titles.description: An exiled spy returns to save India from a rogue spy and an attack.

titles.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkaar
titles.description: A break-up specialist gets more than he bargained for when he falls for his client.

titles.title: Creed III
titles.description: Adonis Creed faces his most formidable opponent yet — his childhood friend Damian.

titles.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
titles.description: John Wick uncovers a path to defeating the High Table.

titles.title: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania
titles.description: Super-Hero partners Scott Lang and Hope Van Dyne are dragged into the Quantum Realm.

titles.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
titles.description: Shazam and his siblings face the daughters of Atlas, ancient gods.
After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, a pilot discovers he's stranded on Earth 65 million years ago.

titles.title: Scream VI
titles.description: The Ghostface killer follows the survivors to New York City.

titles.title: Champions
titles.description: A basketball coach must train a team of players with intellectual disabilities.

titles.title: Squid Game
titles.description: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. Inside, a deadly game unfolds.

titles.title: Money Heist (La Casa de Papel)
titles.description: A criminal mastermind who goes by 'The Professor' recruits a band of thieves to carry out an elaborate heist.

titles.title: Stranger Things
titles.description: When a young boy disappears, his mother, friends, and local police must confront terrifying supernatural forces.

titles.title: Wednesday
titles.description: Wednesday Addams is sent to Nevermore Academy. She attempts to master her psychic powers.

titles.title: Euphoria
titles.description: A group of high school students navigate love and friendships in a world of drugs, sex, trauma, and social media.

titles.title: The Crown
titles.description: Follows the political rivalries and romance of Queen Elizabeth II's reign and the events that shaped the second half of the 20th century.

titles.title: House of the Dragon
titles.description: The story of House Targaryen set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones.

titles.title: The Last of Us
titles.description: Joel, a hardened survivor, is hired to smuggle Ellie out of an oppressive quarantine zone.

titles.title: Ertugrul (Dirilis)
titles.description: The story of Ertugrul Ghazi, a brave warrior and father of Osman who founded the Ottoman Empire.

titles.title: Humsafar
titles.description: The story of two cousins Ashar and Khirad who are forced to marry, and the complicated relationship that follows.
